---
title: "Nasal Swab Dissociation Livestream"
description: "Wellcome Nasal Swab Dissociation Livestream"
date: "2022-08-08"
categories: [Workshop]
---

<!-- ![](featured.png) -->

- Isolate single cells from frozen nasopharyngeal swab, Single cell capture, Whole transcriptomic amplification, Library preparation, Loading on
NextSeq 2000 and Computational Analysis by Jaclyn Long from Ordovas‑Montanes Lab, Boston Childrens Hospital
- Collaboration with MIT, Boston Childrens Hospitaland Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation
